page_title: Zankoku na Tenshi no These 2009 VERSION
text:
is a single by Yoko Takahashi. The single was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICM-1272. It was released on 13 May 2009. https://vgmdb.net/album/35772

Lyrics: Neko Oikawa
Composition: Hidetoshi Sato
Arrangement: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocal: Yoko Takahashi

Track-02
Lyrics & Composition: Bart Howard
Arrangement: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocal: Yoko Takahashi

Track-03
Lyrics: Yoko Takahashi
Composition & Arrangement: Daisuke Mori
Vocal: Yoko Takahashi
